texto: I understood that it was time to quit postponing the embracing of my own potential. There was nothing more I needed to do to be worthy enough – and any other excuse I could muster to explain why I couldn’t step up right away – was simply that… an excuse.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Janet Louise Stephenson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I understood that it was time to quit postponing the embracing of my own potential. There was not…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, personal-development, spirituality, útil em momentos de spirituality.
